; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @printf(ptr, ...)

; --- definitions ---
; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %merge_1 = alloca i32
  %merge_3 = alloca i32
  %t0 = add i32 0, 360
  store i32 %t0, ptr %merge_1
  %t1 = add i32 0, 2
  store i32 %t1, ptr %merge_3
  br label %bb1
bb1:
  %t2 = load i32, ptr %merge_1
  %t3 = add i32 0, 1
  %t4 = icmp sgt i32 %t2, %t3
  br i1 %t4, label %bb2, label %bb3
bb2:
  br label %bb4
bb3:
  ret i32 0
bb4:
  %t5 = load i32, ptr %merge_1
  %t6 = load i32, ptr %merge_3
  %t7 = srem i32 %t5, %t6
  %t8 = add i32 0, 0
  %t9 = icmp eq i32 %t7, %t8
  br i1 %t9, label %bb5, label %bb6
bb5:
  %t10 = load i32, ptr %merge_3
  call i32 (ptr, ...) @printf(ptr @.fmt.int_println, i32 %t10)
  %t12 = load i32, ptr %merge_1
  %t13 = load i32, ptr %merge_3
  %t14 = sdiv i32 %t12, %t13
  store i32 %t14, ptr %merge_1
  br label %bb4
bb6:
  %t15 = load i32, ptr %merge_3
  %t16 = add i32 0, 1
  %t17 = add i32 %t15, %t16
  store i32 %t17, ptr %merge_3
  br label %bb1
}
